title: NG20 8SS, Mercia Power Response (Sookholme Road) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/KP3229LS/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Mercia Power Response (Sookholme Road) Limited   Installation name: Sookholme Road   Permit number: EPR/KP3229LS/A001   "
